creative_brief: Split screen showing fresh cattle grazing vs warehouse storage with day counters: Day 1 vs Day 21.
primary_text: Last Monday Rachel Ward watched her regenerative beef sit in cold storage for 21 days before reaching Sydney shelves. Her Kempsey cattle graze chemical-free pastures, but the big chains add weeks to your plate. Now her beef reaches families in 5 days via FarmThru. No wholesalers. No warehouses. Farm to Brookvale hub to your kitchen. We can't promise returns, but we can show you exactly where your food comes from.
headline: Rachel's beef: 5 days fresh, not 3 weeks old
